name: daily-poem-card
description: A bilingual Electron poem card studio with motion backgrounds, author dialogue, and exportable daily cards.
author: YunXue

scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:motion-runtime && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --config electron-builder.config.mjs && node scripts/build-full-windows-installer.mjs && node scripts/bundle-windows-installer.mjs
